activities_projects.title: Critical Analysis of Mme Loisel’s Downfall
activities_projects.objective: Critically examine the cause of Mme Loisel’s ruin
steps: Identify internal and external causes
Analyse how her choices affect her fate

activities_projects.title: Irony in the Story
steps: Identify ironic situations in the story
Explain their impact on the reader

activities_projects.title: Theme of Appearance vs Reality
steps: List scenes showing false appearances
Explain how reality contrasts with them

activities_projects.title: Role of Society in Mme Loisel’s Tragedy
activities_projects.objective: Examine social pressure as a cause
steps: Identify societal expectations shown
Explain their influence on Mme Loisel

activities_projects.title: Symbolism of the Necklace
activities_projects.objective: Interpret the necklace as a symbol
steps: Identify symbolic meanings
Explain how the symbol drives the story

activities_projects.title: Decision-Making and Consequences
steps: List important decisions taken
Explain their long-term effects

activities_projects.title: Character Transformation
steps: Compare her character before and after the loss
Explain the transformation in detail

activities_projects.title: Author’s View on Materialism
steps: Identify incidents related to wealth
Explain the author’s criticism

activities_projects.title: Moral Responsibility
steps: Analyse choices made by Mme and Mr Loisel
Evaluate their moral responsibility

activities_projects.title: Relevance of the Story Today
activities_projects.objective: Relate the story to modern society
steps: Identify modern examples of similar issues
Explain the relevance of the story today
